title: What just happened
question: What happened, what was the impact, and what actually fixed it?
inputs: the chat log, alert history, or deploy log the timeline derives from
tldr: Three sentences: trigger, impact, mitigation, durable fix — no mystery left.

timeline.title: First hypothesis
timeline.body: Kept even when falsified, with how it was tested.

timeline.title: Mitigated
timeline.body: The step that stopped the bleeding.

timeline.title: Durable fix
timeline.body: The change that removes the cause.

rootCause: The mechanism, stated causally, with the condition that let it ship.

evidence.snippet:
// the code state that produced the incident
function example() {}

conditions: a contributing condition distinct from the cause

followUps.text: a follow-up without an invented owner
